name: ClubReady Fitness Franchise Management API
what_it_does: ClubReady fitness franchise management REST API for fitness franchisors, multi-location studio operators, and health club brands to manage franchisee locations, members, and brand standards compliance. Enables AI agents to manage franchise location onboarding and configuration for fitness brand expansion automation, handle member enrollment and membership plan management for franchise studio automation, access class scheduling and instructor management for multi-location fitness booking automation, retrieve membership billing and recurring payment for franchise revenue automation, manage lead capture and sales funnel for franchise studio sales automation, handle franchisor reporting and location performance analytics for franchise management automation, access corporate brand compliance and standard operating procedure tracking for franchise audit automation, retrieve multi-location member portability for franchise network member experience automation, manage staff training and certification tracking for franchise employee compliance, and integrate ClubReady with payment processors and franchise management systems for end-to-end fitness franchise operations.
use_cases: Onboarding franchise locations from fitness brand expansion agents
Managing multi-location members from franchise network agents
Reporting franchise performance from franchisor analytics agents
Auditing brand standards from franchise compliance agents
not_for: Independent single-location gyms (use PushPress or Mindbody)
Enterprise health club chains with proprietary systems (use ABC Fitness)
best_when: A fitness franchisor, branded fitness studio chain, or multi-location boutique fitness operator wanting AI agents to automate franchisee location management, member enrollment, performance reporting, and brand standards compliance across the franchise network.
avoid_when: FRANCHISE TERRITORY MEMBER DATA ISOLATION: Automated member data access via ClubReady must enforce franchise territory boundaries; automated cross-territory member data access without franchisor authorization creates franchise agreement violation and member privacy exposure. FRANCHISEE PERFORMANCE DATA SHARING: Automated franchisor reporting via ClubReady aggregates franchisee performance data; automated comparative performance reporting must comply with franchise disclosure document (FDD) requirements for earnings claims; automated performance benchmarking that creates implied earnings representations creates FTC franchise rule compliance risk. STATE HEALTH CLUB ACT MEMBERSHIP AGREEMENT: Automated membership agreement generation for franchise locations must apply state-specific Health Club Act requirements for the franchisee's operating state; franchise template agreements without state-specific terms create state consumer protection violation.

auth.notes: ClubReady uses API key and OAuth for partner and franchisor integrations. REST API with JSON. Scottsdale, Arizona HQ. Founded 2008. Acquired by Jonas Software (Constellation Software subsidiary) in 2016. Focused on fitness franchise brands and multi-location studio operators. Served brands including Snap Fitness, Anytime Fitness partners, and boutique studio franchises. Member management, class scheduling, billing, and franchisor reporting. Competes with ABC Fitness, Mindbody, and Mariana Tek for fitness franchise management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-location subscription for franchise networks
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-location monthly subscription; franchisor enterprise agreement for brand network pricing; API access included in franchisor agreement
pricing.notes: Scottsdale AZ. Jonas Software (Constellation Software) subsidiary. Founded 2008. Per-location subscription. Franchisor enterprise pricing. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key per location; member and schedule queries throttled; webhooks for member and billing events

known_agent_gotchas: FRANCHISE LOCATION API KEY PER LOCATION: ClubReady API access requires separate API key per franchise location; automated multi-location workflows must manage per-location API key inventory; API key management at scale requires secure key vault and rotation strategy for franchise networks with 100+ locations

FRANCHISOR vs FRANCHISEE DATA ACCESS LEVELS: ClubReady distinguishes franchisor-level API access (network-wide reporting) from franchisee-level API access (single location operations); automated workflows must use appropriate API credential tier for data scope; franchisor-level API key exposing member data to unauthorized franchisee creates territory data isolation violation

CONSTELLATION SOFTWARE ACQUISITION PRODUCT STAGNATION RISK: ClubReady is a Jonas Software (Constellation Software) acquisition; Constellation Software portfolio products may receive limited development investment post-acquisition; evaluate API feature roadmap and deprecation patterns before building complex automated workflows dependent on ClubReady-specific features

FDD EARNINGS CLAIMS IN AUTOMATED REPORTING: Automated franchisor reporting via ClubReady that benchmarks franchisee location performance against brand average creates implied earnings representation; FTC franchise rule requires specific FDD disclosure for financial performance representations; automated comparative performance email to prospects without FDD Item 19 compliance creates franchise registration violation

MEMBER PORTABILITY ACROSS FRANCHISE TERRITORIES: Automated member home location transfer across franchise territories via ClubReady must respect franchise territory rights; automated member transfer without originating franchisee agreement may violate franchise territory exclusivity provisions

CLASS BOOKING OVERBOOKING UNDER CONCURRENT REQUESTS: ClubReady class capacity enforcement may have race condition under concurrent booking requests from franchise network booking aggregation; automated multi-location class booking via franchisor portal must handle capacity conflict errors and implement retry with alternative class time fallback
agent_readiness.security_notes: Fitness franchise management. PCI-DSS. API key/OAuth. US/CA. Member PII, payment data, and franchise performance records.

security_score_components.security_notes: Fitness franchise. PCI-DSS. API key/OAuth. US/CA. Member personal, payment, and franchise data.
